title: erysimum capitatum var. bealianum
intro: Erysimum capitatum var. bealianum, also known as the Bealian Wallflower, is a variety of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. The Bealian Wallflower has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular remedy for colds, coughs, and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Erysimum capitatum var. bealianum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
